name: Snow Griddle Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour and a pinch of salt in a bowl.
2. Gradually add light, fresh-fallen snow to the mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Add sweet milk and mix until you have a smooth batter.
4. Heat a small amount of butter on a griddle or frying pan.
5. Pour spoonfuls of batter onto the hot griddle.
6. Cook the cakes for a few minutes on each side, until they are lightly browned.
7. Serve the cakes warm with butter and sugar, or with syrup. Enjoy their delicate texture!
